scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "dotnet watch --project src/DotnetTemplate.Api run --launch-profile http" "npm --prefix apps/frontend run dev"
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.db:migrate: dotnet tool restore && dotnet ef database update --project src/DotnetTemplate.Api --startup-project src/DotnetTemplate.Api
scripts.test:with-services: COMPOSE_SERVICES="postgres" bash scripts/run-with-compose-services.sh npm run test
